name: Storm's Fury
description: The Stormrend Accord strikes fast, disrupts everything, and vanishes before retaliation. Eight missions of lightning warfare.

missions.name: First Lightning
missions.briefing: A Bastion patrol has spotted Stormrend raider teams. Strike before they can report back.
objectives: Remain undetected by the main base

missions.name: Blitz Protocol
missions.briefing: Hit Ironmarch's forward logistics before they can dig in.
objectives: Hit and withdraw before the main Ironmarch force arrives
missions.twist: Ironmarch Juggernauts will arrive at the 8-minute mark — be gone before then.

missions.name: Counter-Surveillance
missions.briefing: Arcloft drones track every Stormrend movement. Blind them.
missions.twist: Arcloft will keep repositioning drones — track and destroy each one quickly.

missions.name: Storm the Beaches
missions.briefing: Stormrend raiders cross the sea to strike Bastion island fortresses.
objectives: Withdraw before Kragmore naval reinforcements arrive
missions.twist: Kragmore dreadnoughts arrive in 10 minutes — the mission must be complete by then.

missions.name: Surge and Fade
missions.briefing: Kragmore heavy columns are slow. Lead them into a kill zone and destroy them.
objectives: Bait the columns into the canyon ambush
missions.twist: Bastion will fortify the canyon exit — destroy their fortifications before leading Kragmore in.

missions.name: The Three-Way
missions.briefing: Three factions fight for the same resource deposit. Stormrend will take what they need and leave the others fighting over scraps.
objectives: Avoid triggering a coalition against Stormrend
missions.twist: Stormrend's speed is its survival — never stop moving.

missions.name: Tempest Rising
missions.briefing: Stormrend Thunderjaw walkers are ready for their first major deployment. Use them to break a fortified Bastion stronghold.
missions.twist: Thunderjaws are powerful but draw massive enemy fire — escort them with fast support units.

missions.name: The Six Fronts
missions.briefing: The Cordite Nexus will be taken by the fastest commander in the war. Tempest Kael leads Stormrend to total victory.
objectives: Be first to destroy the Nexus defence turrets
Establish a Refinery on the Nexus before any other faction
missions.twist: Speed is everything — Stormrend must reach the Nexus before enemies can block the approach.
